description: Create an interactive form tiddler titled 'New Patient Registration Form'. The form must use a temporary state tiddler named '$:/temp/NewPatient' to store draft data for the fields 'patient_name', 'dob', and 'physician'. Include a button labeled 'Register Patient' that, when clicked, creates a new tiddler with the title set to the 'patient_name' value, the tag 'Patient', and fields for 'dob' and 'physician'. The body of the new tiddler must be exactly '!! Intake Notes\n* ' (with a newline before the asterisk and a space after it). Upon clicking the button, the '$:/temp/NewPatient' tiddler must also be deleted to reset the form.
